subcodes.first_line: O fragrant breeze wafting from the gardens of God's bounty, verily the pure, tranquil soul, steadfast in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها النفحه المعطره من ریاض موهبه الله ان النفس الزکیه المطمئنه الثابته علی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
